untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 2-day RSI of VIX (rsi_2), but only rsi_7, rsi_14, and rsi_21 are available. The signal header mentions EMA/SMA crossovers on VIX but the source text describes RSI conditions on VIX index instead. These are conflicting rule definitions.
translation_notes: Translated from source text (MarketSci Blog): Buy when (1) S&P closes above 200-day MA, (2) 2-day RSI of VIX > 90, (3) Today's VIX open > yesterday's VIX close. Exit when 2-day RSI closes above 65. Used india_vix as proxy for VIX index. Cannot satisfy 2-day RSI requirement with available indicators (minimum is rsi_7). Signal ID header describes different rule (EMA/SMA crossover) which conflicts with source text.
